brokerProtocol.description: Transport used to deliver Sentry integration-platform events.

notes: Official Sentry Integration Platform webhooks documentation: https://docs.sentry.io/integrations/integration-platform/webhooks/issue-alerts/

Sentry does not publish a first-party AsyncAPI/JSON Schema document for integration-platform webhooks; this manifest pins the official documentation entry point used for the catalog entry, matching the precedent set by the Salesforce/Airtable OpenAPI manifests.
Selected channel models Sentry's officially documented 'issue_alert' webhook resource, confirmed via the Sentry-Hook-Resource request header described in the docs.
Auth models the Sentry Client Secret used to compute the Sentry-Hook-Signature HMAC for inbound webhook payload verification, supplied via env ref only.
This is a read-only, inbound event receiver: no outbound mutating calls are made to Sentry.

network: Inbound HTTPS POST from Sentry to the configured webhook endpoint for the selected issue_alert resource; no outbound calls to Sentry are required
process: Run pnpm build/test scripts only inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation
Run node only as invoked by generated project package scripts inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation
